title: Opening for Financial Analyst at Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Financial Analyst in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
